emails.subject: House of Mantra - RAV Vast Sound Journey Facilitator
emails.body:
Ciao,

Sono FLUTUR, artista endorsato RAV Vast e sound healing facilitator.

Ho visto il progetto House of Mantra e credo che il mio lavoro si allinei perfettamente: creo sound journey immersivi con RAV Vast e live looping, trasformando ogni sessione in una cerimonia meditativa.

Credenziali:
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- 4 anni di residenza sunset ceremonies (Villa Porta, Lago Maggiore)
- Main stage Drishti Beats Festival 2023 (Colorado, USA)
- Greece's Got Talent - 4 YES

Proposta: Sound journey per House of Mantra - apertura/chiusura sessioni yoga o evento dedicato.

-> Video meditativo: https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Disponibile per una call o incontro a Milano.

Grazie,
FLUTUR
flutur.music@gmail.com
emails.notes: Entry point = House of Mantra, NOT main stage. ETNA (Jamy Caruso) decides music.

emails.subject: RAV Vast Sound Healer - Cooldown/Opening Sets
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast endorsed artist specializing in sound healing and live looping.

I'm interested in contributing to ED Berlin as a cooldown/opening musician. I create gentle, transcendent journeys that help dancers integrate their experience.

Background:
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- 4-year sunset meditation residency (Villa Porta, Lake Maggiore)
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 main stage (Colorado, USA)
- Greece's Got Talent - 4 YES votes

Proposal: 15-20 min sound healing sets for your 10 PM slot or opening warmup.

-> Meditation session: https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Available for trial dates. Looking forward to connecting.

Best,
FLUTUR
flutur.music@gmail.com
emails.notes: They have dedicated 'Sound Healing with live musician' slot at 10 PM. Pascal de Lacaze is co-founder.

emails.subject: RAV Vast Cooldown Artist - Guest Rotation
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast player and sound healer. I noticed ED Rotterdam already incorporates handpan in cooldown sessions - I'd love to contribute as a guest rotation artist.

The RAV Vast has a deeper, richer overtone than traditional handpan, creating a unique meditative quality perfect for post-dance integration.

Credentials:
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 main stage
- Greece's Got Talent finalist

Proposal: 2-3 trial dates as cooldown musician, building toward rotating residency.

-> Sound sample: https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Looking forward to connecting with your community.

Best,
FLUTUR
emails.notes: PeTro (founder) plays handpan there for 12+ years. Position as complementary, not competitor.

emails.subject: Sound Journey Facilitator for Monthly ED/Kirtan
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast endorsed artist and sound healing facilitator.

I discovered your monthly Ecstatic Dance and Kirtan events, and I believe my sound journeys would complement your offerings beautifully. I create meditative ceremonies with RAV Vast and live looping.

Background:
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- 4-year residency creating sunset ceremonies for luxury hospitality (Villa Porta, Lake Maggiore)
- Main stage performer at Drishti Beats Festival 2023 (Colorado)
- Greece's Got Talent - 4 YES votes

Proposal: Sound journey session for your monthly ED (opening or cooldown) or dedicated sound healing evening.

-> Meditation session: https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

I'm available for a trial session. Would love to visit your sanctuary.

Warm regards,
FLUTUR
flutur.music@gmail.com
emails.notes: Family-run woodland sanctuary. Monthly ED + Kirtan. 30min from Lisbon, 15min from Ericeira.

emails.subject: Live Looping Sunset Act - RAV Vast + Guitar + Vocals
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a live looping artist creating sunset sessions with RAV Vast, guitar, vocals and Ableton.

Kumharas' reputation for alternative cultures and authentic artists resonates with my approach - organic sounds, world music influences, and live creation.

Setup: Solo act creating full arrangements through live looping. Minimal to full production, adaptable to your space.

Credentials:
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency (Lake Maggiore)
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 main stage
- Greece's Got Talent - 4 YES

Available for summer 2026 sunset slots.

-> Live session: https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Happy to call or meet during off-season.

Best,
FLUTUR
flutur.music@gmail.com
emails.notes: Word-of-mouth venue. Call or visit in person Oct-April for best results. They book 'all kinds of styles'.

emails.subject: Solo Live Act for Sunset Sessions
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a solo live act creating sunset sessions with RAV Vast, guitar, vocals and live looping.

I love that Sunset Ashram gives musicians artistic freedom - I create full arrangements solo, bringing surprise and freshness through world music and ambient soundscapes.

Setup: RAV Vast (sound healing instrument) + acoustic/electric guitar + vocals + Ableton Push for live looping. No backing band needed, adaptable duration.

Credentials:
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 main stage (USA)
- Greece's Got Talent finalist

Available summer 2026.

-> Sunset session: https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Happy to call to discuss.

Best,
FLUTUR
+39 XXX XXX XXXX
emails.notes: Call +34 661 347 222 and ask for music programming manager. They value 'surprise, diversity, freshness'.

emails.subject: Live World Music for Sunset Sessions
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a live musician creating organic sunset sessions with RAV Vast, guitar, vocals and live looping.

Nalu's sunset vibe on the Riviera is exactly the setting where my music shines - world music meets ambient electronics, created live.

Setup: Solo act with RAV Vast (steel percussion), acoustic guitar, vocals, live looping. Creates full arrangements without a band.

Credentials:
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- 4-year sunset residency (Villa Porta, Lake Maggiore)
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 main stage (Colorado)
- Greece's Got Talent - 4 YES votes

Available for summer 2026 (May-September).

-> Sunset session: https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Happy to discuss via call or email.

Best,
FLUTUR
flutur.music@gmail.com
emails.notes: Contact March for May-Sept bookings. Instagram DM first (@nalu_athens), then email, then call.

emails.subject: Workshop + Performance Application - RAV Vast Sound Journey
emails.body:
Hello Evolve Team,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast endorsed artist specializing in sound healing and live performance.

I'm applying to contribute to Evolve Festival 2026 in the following ways:

WORKSHOP:
- Title: 'Sound Journeys with RAV Vast: Healing Through Live Performance'
- Duration: 90-120 minutes
- Focus: Sound healing, meditation, live looping demonstration
- Audience: All levels

PERFORMANCE:
- Setup: RAV Vast + live looping + guitar + vocals
- Style: Meditative to ecstatic, transformational
- Duration: 30-45 minutes (flexible)

Credentials:
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (Snowmass Village, Colorado)
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency (Villa Porta)
- Greece's Got Talent - 4 YES votes

-> Performance video: https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Looking forward to sharing with your community.

Best,
FLUTUR
flutur.music@gmail.com
emails.notes: 100% sober festival. Already has handpan workshops (Rob Ginero). Apply Sept-Nov for 2026. Aug 27-30, 2026.

emails.subject: RAV Vast Performance + Workshop Application
emails.body:
Hello Pangonia Team,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast endorsed artist applying for Pangonia 2026.

I bring a unique perspective to the handpan community - RAV Vast with live looping, creating full arrangements that bridge sound healing and electronic production.

Proposal:
1. PERFORMANCE: RAV Vast + live looping set (30-45 min)
2. WORKSHOP: 'RAV Vast Looping Techniques' (90 min) - how to build layers and create full compositions solo

Credentials:
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 main stage (Colorado, USA)
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency
- Greece's Got Talent - 4 YES
- Collab with Equanimous (100M+ streams artist)

-> Performance: https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Excited to connect with the Pangonia community.

Best,
FLUTUR
flutur.music@gmail.com
emails.notes: July 15-19, 2026. 3 pillars: Handpan + Fire/Flow + Sauna. Position as 'diverse/colorful'.

emails.subject: Live Musician for Ecstatic Dance - RAV Vast Opening/Closing
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast endorsed artist specializing in sound healing and live performance.

I noticed Black Forest features live handpan (Engelbert) - I'd love to contribute as a complementary artist with RAV Vast, which has a unique tonal quality different from traditional handpan.

Proposal:
- Opening warmup for morning ED sessions
- Closing sound journey for integration
- Workshop: Sound Healing with RAV Vast

Credentials:
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 main stage
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency
- Greece's Got Talent finalist

-> Sound sample: https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Looking forward to connecting.

Best,
FLUTUR
flutur.music@gmail.com
emails.notes: Already books handpan (Engelbert). Open-sky dancing, mystical/nature focus. July 2026.

priorityOrder: Giardino dei Visionari - Entry point to Milan conscious scene
ED Berlin - Dedicated sound healing slot
Nalu Athens - Perfect fit for summer
The Shanti Space - Monthly events, ongoing relationship
Kumharas - Bohemian Ibiza, live music focus
Black Forest ED - Already books handpan artists
